title: nls
text: nls Create Nchar and Nvarchar fields (instead of Char and Varchar) at table creation. USYS$INF_PARAMS nls Description If this connector option is set, and Informix NLS functionality has been enabled, tables are created with Nchar and Nvarchar fields instead of Char and Varchar fields. If Informix NLS functionality is not enabled, the Informix database server generates an error and the table is not created. If this option is not present, Char and Varchar fields are created. For more information on NLS functionality, refer to your Informix documentation. Related Links Informix Data Packing Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
